labels.name: Confidential
labels.tooltip: Data that requires protection and is intended for internal use only

sublabels.name: All-Employees
sublabels.tooltip: Encrypted - accessible to all employees within the organization

contentMarking.footerText: Do not share outside the organization

emails.subject: Q4 Financial Summary - Confidential
emails.body: Hi Jonathan, attached is the Q4 financial summary. For reference, the wire transfer was initiated from account 0012345678 (routing 021000021). Please review before the board meeting. This information is strictly confidential.

emails.subject: Client Payment Issue
emails.body: Marcus, the client provided their credit card for the overdue invoice: 4111-1111-1111-1111, exp 12/27. Can you process this through the payment portal? Let me know if you need additional details.

emails.subject: Employee Background Check Results
emails.body: Natalie, here are the background check results for the new hire. SSN on file: 123-45-6789. Everything came back clean. Please file this with the other onboarding documents and mark as confidential.

emails.subject: Suspicious Activity - Insider Trading Concern
emails.body: Jonathan, I flagged unusual data access patterns from a departing employee. They downloaded several files related to the upcoming merger, including documents marked classified. This could indicate insider trading risk. We should initiate a breach investigation immediately.
